guardrails.label: No user-supplied content in innerHTML without sanitisation
No credentials, tokens, or personal data in committed files
Viz reads local JSON only — no external fetch calls
Gate logic reads evidence fields from pipeline-state.json (not stage alone)
Fields written to pipeline-state.json must exist in schema
Fields read by viz from pipeline-state.json must exist in schema
pipeline-viz.html renders without build step, server, or network
No npm devDependencies in pipeline-viz.html runtime
Stage enum in schema updated when skill adds/removes stage
Gate add/remove synced with SKILL.md criteria
Interactive elements keyboard-accessible
Colour not sole indicator of gate status (icons/labels present)
Single-file viz, no build step
Gates must use evidence fields, not stage-proxy
Schema-first: fields defined before use
context.yml is the single config source of truth
Single-file HTML viz architecture
State access via parsed pipelineState global
Gate pass/fail by evidence fields
Schema evolution: add fields simultaneously
Config reading via context.yml
Gate logic checking feature.stage only
Hardcoded org/tool names in skill files
External CDN dependencies in viz at runtime
Fields used by viz/skills but not in schema
Committing viz changes without passing check-viz-syntax.js
